criteria.text: Widget visually matches the original demo (layout, key colors, key interactions)
Core behaviour of the original widget works end-to-end (no broken features, no console errors)
Mandatory additional feature described in the widget's task file is implemented and works correctly
Feature is integrated with the rest of the UI (does not break Stage 1 functionality, handles edge cases reasonably)
Optional improvement #1 - well executed
Optional improvement #2 - well executed
Optional improvement #3 - well executed
JavaScript code is minified or obfuscated
A forbidden JS library/framework is used (jQuery, React, Vue, Angular, etc.) - the whole widget is voided
Browser-console self-evaluation is missing or does not list the claimed items
Commit history does not reflect real development (single dump commit)
PR is not open against main with a working Netlify preview link
Major bug - functionality works but breaks after some manipulations or throws console errors (per bug)
Minor bug - functionality works but visual/state behaviour is off (per bug)
